As an undocumented student I wanted to go to college without paying or falling into debt. Found out I couldn’t get a loan so cash or scholarship were my only options. It took me 8  years to do it but I finally graduate in May. I only paid for 1 year of school. I had to switch major due to affordability and government regulations on undocumented students. Plead with the vice president of UCF and Valencia college to help me. Maintained honors status for the honors scholarship. The school of Social work paid for a year. Received a scholarship for DACA students. I have a mentor who files paperwork every semester so that I can get instate tuition. No financial support from family and moving out at 19. All while eventually becoming financially independent as an entrepreneur. I did that and I am more proud of my self than I’ve ever been. Semester ends in 6 weeks 🌸
